feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: seek an answer.
entry.content: What technical and business processchanges should be noted when upgradingfrom SAP ECC 6.0 to S/4HANA 2021?

entry.title: How to show a busy indicator in story while the table values load from live connection?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a story where I'm pulling the data from SAP source via live connection. There are multiple widgets in the story and few tables and charts are using this SAP live data source to pull the data into the story. When the story loads for the first time, there is some delay in refreshing the data for the widgets which pulls data from live data source. My requirement is to show a custom message/ busy indicator to the users until all the data in these widgets is refreshed within the story. I'm not sure if there is a specific function which tells me that the data refresh is completed from the live connection so that I can write the script accordingly.   

Anyone who has faced this similar issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: SAC : How to switch off the None essential Functions: Just Ask, Chat, Search and Notifications ?
entry.content:
Hi,

for SAC:

Its possible to switch off the None essential Functions  like
Just Ask, Chat, Search and Notifications for most users ?

 

Make it at as easy as possible for the user, not distracting him.

The users should work and not play .

How ?

Thank You !

Best Wishes

Martin

entry.title: Error in Data Action after activate Data Access Control in a Dimension
entry.content:
I developed a Story using the SAP Analytic Application, which included a Data Action where I passed some parameters. Everything was working fine until I added Data Access Control to the model. After adding Data Access Control to the project model and running the Data Action again, the calculation stopped working with this error There are validation errors in the data action "XXX" when trying to run it on version "Actual".
Does anyone know how to solve this issue or have any guidance on how Data Access Control might be affecting the Data Action in SAP Analytics Application?
PS: the data action has been validated successfully.
Error:

Setting Parameter:

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Can we connect Datasphere Live Models in SAC Excel Add-in?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to connect Datasphere Live Data Models in SAC Excel Add-in?

Thank you.

entry.title: Chart Display Issues with SAP BW Live Queries in SAC
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are encountering an issue while using an SAP BW Live Query in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) during our migration process from Lumira Designer to SAC.
Our goal is to reuse the same BW queries in SAC that were previously implemented in Lumira Designer. However, we are facing problems with the display of a chart widget.

Here’s the situation:

  • The result in Lumira Designer (and also in Analysis for Office) displays correctly, as expected by our customer:

Lumira:

 Analysis for Office

 

 The query behind this result is quite complex and involves cell definitions. Despite this complexity, both Lumira Designer and AFO manage to display the charts as required.

In SAC, however, the chart displays incorrectly:

While I can manually adjust the colors to group the measures so they visually align with Lumira Designer and AFO, the legend remains incorrect:

 

  • The query output consists of filtered measures (5 measures = 5 columns) in the rows.
  • The columns contain a complex structure, including time selections and version information (e.g., ACT P011/2024).

 Since the query is highly complex, adapting or simplifying it is not an option.

My key question is:
Are there known limitations or workarounds in SAC for handling complex BW queries with such structures?

Any guidance or insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Mario

entry.title: How to make a acuired SAC model 24 months rolling
entry.content:
Hi,

I have made a model in SAC which is getting updated every day from a sap hana database.
Now I want to have it in such a way that it always has the current months and past 23 months. But I don't know how to make this. I can filter on the year, such that I only have 2024 and 2025. But I want to have it that I have now feb 2023 to jan 2025 included and next month march 2023 till feb 2025. Is this possible?

Also when I want to add something to a model later on it says:

"The query selection cannot be changed"

I want to change a attribute of a column to textual but this is not allowed. Are you not allowed to change a model once it is made?

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAC ADDIN EXCEL - Locked menu
entry.content:
Hi all,

I 've to update an excel file with SAC Addin formulas but all menus in the Designer are grayed (locked) and I can't change anything. (add members in filter, delete or create new Datasource, etc ...)
This excel file was created by someone who has lived our company.

Who know how unlock the menus ?
I Hope it is possible !!
Thanks in Advance!!

Frederic

entry.title: Managing User Roles Directly in Azure
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We use Azure as an IdP, SAP Cloud Identity Services as a proxy, and various cloud apps. Is there a way to grant access to users who are accessing a cloud app directly in Azure, i.e., to assign roles (what a user can do within the cloud app)? In other words, to assign roles to the users in Azure and not in the cloud app? And is this even recommended?

Thanks you very much.

 

Best regards

entry.title: FS Items and GL Account Mapping Table into SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a way to get the FS Items and GL Account Number mapping table into SAC? We have master data import connection into SAC from S/4Hana Group Reporting and mapping table is maintened in S4/Hana Group Reporting, however I cannot find it in the Master Data import connection to SAC.

entry.title: how to get count of a name that is appearing multiple times in a column
entry.content:
hello,

i was trying to get count of a name that is repeating multiple times in a column 

Can anyone suggest me how to get below desire output in sap analytics cloud (SAC).

for example: 

Country
US
US
US
US
US
Canada
Canada
Canada
Canada
Brazil
Canada
Brazil
Brazil
Brazil
India
India
India
India
India
US
Brazil
US
Canada
US

 

Customer Group Code NameCount of Customer Group Code Name
ATI ALLVAC LTD2
CARRIER8
CITIGROUP180
GALLAGHER6
L’OREAL16
MMC98
NXP2
OTIS1
PARAMOUNT60
SCHINDLER HOLDING LTD.

25

entry.title: Handling Date Logic in SAC and SAP BW
entry.content:
Hey! Currently I'm trying to figure out a way to handle date logic in SAC when using a model from a Live Connection to a BW. We use BW queries as data models in the SAC. For those queries we created customer exits to handle the logic for the month, our customer wants the months to switch on the 25th. For example:

On 24th of Mar, the Customer Exit gives Jan as output. On 25th of Mar, the Customer Exit gives Feb as output.

But for some widgets in the SAC, such as diagramms with showing a numerical keyfigure, we need to show the deviation to the previous year. But afaik SAC requires using a time dimension with a virtual time hierarchy for that and a single time filter in the widget, to be able to select the deviation from the current to the previous time interval. 

How can we recreate the logic with the 25th of a day for that case? How do you normally handle dates in the interaction of SAC with BW, when there is a custom logic for the month that is to be shown?

I'm thankful for every helpful comment and investigation, thanks!

entry.title: Optimized Design Experience as the default for the entire SAC tenant
entry.content:
Dear community,

the client wants to set the Optimized Design Experience as the default for the entire SAC tenant. Does anyone have experience with configuring this setting? If so, could you provide recommendations on the steps to be followed?

Thank you & Kind regards,

Victoria

entry.title: How to define custom geographic areas in a SAP Analytics Cloud geomap?
entry.content:
Hi Experts, newbie to SAP Analytics Cloud here.

Is it possible to define custom geographic areas in a built-in sac geomap?.

By default the geomap displays the country's map and the states (province) maps. My requirement is to define some custom regions where each of them group one or multiple states. It would be like an intermediate level between the country level and states level.

Any recomendation is more than welcome, thanks.

entry.title: Hello Every one,I have a question regarding BO 4.3 SP04 DR Implementation in Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Every one, 

We are in the process of implementing SAP SAP BO 4.3 SP04 Implementation in cloud ( Prod and DR). 

Currently, BO 4.3 SP04 Prod set up in Cloud have (one Web and Two Application server) Tomcat Web server_A, Application server_B and Server_C

I have a question regarding BO 4.3 SP04 DR Implementation in Cloud 

Can we have separate Tomcat Web server_D, Application server_E and Server_F

Once Prod database and FRS is copied over to DR system, can we install Application on server_E and Server_F with same Cluster Key ?

My only worry is Both DR and PROD environments are part of the same cluster.

DR nodes are simply stopped and disabled during normal operations.

During DR event DR nodes are started and accessed from new Tomcat server, PROD nodes are disabled.
Any documentation or Help will be greatly appreciated

Thanks 

VaraP

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud hourly/minutely calculations
entry.content:
Hello, 
I'm working on a salary/HR model, and I have a request to analyse the average extra hours done (and use it later for plan) the data I have is hh:mm. 

my model by the way has a monthly granularity.

what's that best practice to handle calculations and aggregation of days, hours and minutes in a dimension or in a measure?

thank you

entry.title: SAC - Linked Analysis - Input Controls and Widgets
entry.content:
Hello,

is it planned that linked analysis works vice versa between input controls and widgets?

At the moment linked analysis only works between widgets

When i click on a datapoint of a widget I would like the input contols (page and story) will be filtered accordingly.

 

It would increase the user friendliness and flexibility a lot.

Kr

entry.title: SAC Compass - any instructions available?
entry.content:
Hi community,

its great that compass is now available in our SAC Test Tenant, I am looking forward to using it!

Is there any instructional material available at this point? I havent found any on SAC Help Portal, SAC Community, SAP Youtube or directly in SAC.

Please let me know if there is any!

Kind regards,

Eric

entry.title: User should not be able to delete the fact data from the model but able to plan the data
entry.content:
How to make sure that, user should not be able to delete the fact data.

In order to restrict user for deleting fact data, we need to disable Maintain rights in the Role for the planning model.

But if we do so, user is not able to plan the data in the model.

Is there anyway to restrict it?

entry.title: Content package: Solution Manager Test Suite Analytics
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues 

I am unsuccessfully trying to leverage the SAP content package created for Solution Manager Test Suite Analytics Solution Manager Test Suite Analytics | SAP Help Portal.

I have imported the content package in my SAC but I cannot connect it to my Solution Manager. I stablished the connection between SAC and BW but data is not refreshed. I do not find anything help in SAP pages and I opened a case to SAP but not getting any guidance.

Have any of you configured this? Any suggestion?

Thanks

Manuel
